 Directive Fixture🔗

Intro paragraph. The numbered-callout below sits in the doc intro, outside any chapter. Because assignCalloutNumber requires two numbered ancestors, it should render with no label.

Theorem.

Theorem outside any numbered chapter — should have no label.

Remark.

Remark outside any numbered chapter — should also have no label.
